caption: A man with blonde hair, wearing a navy blue t-shirt and a gaming headset, appears in a small picture-in-picture window in the bottom left of a video game screen. He is positioned in front of a decorated Christmas tree. The main screen displays a "90+ ZERO CHILL PLAYER" card for "DAVID NJOKU," a "TE" with a "90 OVR" rating and the label "VERTICAL THREAT." In the top right corner, several numbers are displayed, including "139,529," "14,600," and "1,787,969." The first frame shows the player card appearing amidst a burst of white and purple particles. The second frame shows the card clearly against a purple background. By the final frame, a bright yellow "QUICKSELL" confirmation window has appeared over the screen, with options at the bottom to "DISMISS ALL" or "CANCEL."
